revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:出雲大社松山分祠]]



 


{{infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|
image=File:Grand Shrine of Izumo Matsuyama Branch Torii.jpg
| name= Izumo Taisha Matsuyama Branch Shrine
| location= 3-5-5 Honmachi, [[:en:Matsuyama City|Matsuyama City]], {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}}
| type degrees=33|Rank minutes=50|Rank seconds=48.06
| longitude degrees=132|longitude minutes=45|longitude seconds=30.17
| map=Japan Matsuyama city
| deity= Ōkuninushi-no-Ōkami
| Shrine Rank= 
| founded= Meiji 9 (1876)
| Main hall= 
| Other names= 
| festival= 
| Rituals= Setsubun Yakuyoke festival
| prefecture= {{ill|Matsuyama|qid=Q200022|1=Matsuyama}}
| coordinates= {{Coord|33.846683|N|132.758381|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
}}
[[File:Mon-_Izumo_taisha.png|thumb|200px|Crest ([[Double Hexagon]] with a sword and [[Karakamon]])]]
[[File:Grand Shrine of Izumo Matsuyama Branch Shaden.jpg|thumb|200px|View of the shrine grounds]]
'''Izumo Taisha Matsuyama Branch Shrine''' (出雲大社松山分祠, Izumo Ōyashiro Matsuyama Bunshi) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Honmachi, [[:en:Matsuyama City|Matsuyama City]], {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}}. It serves as a branch of [[Izumo-taisha|Izumo Taisha]] in [[Izumo City]], {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}.

== Enshrined deity ==
* [[Ōkuninushi]] (Ōkuninushi-no-Ōkami)

== History ==
* {{ill|1876|en|1876|qid=Q7766|lt=1876|1=1876}} (Meiji 9) - The shrine received a divine spirit from Izumo Taisha.
* {{ill|1877|en|1877|qid=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}} (Meiji 10) - The inauguration ceremony of the Taisha Church Office was conducted by the 80th generation [[Izumo Kokuzō]], [[Senke Takatoshi]].
* {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} (Shōwa 20) - The shrine buildings were destroyed during the [[Matsuyama Air Raid]].
* {{ill|1963|en|1963|qid=Q2755|lt=1963|1=1963}} (Shōwa 38) - The worship hall was reconstructed.
* {{ill|2000|en|2000|qid=Q1985|lt=2000|1=2000}} (Heisei 12) - Reconstruction work began due to severe termite damage and deterioration of the shrine office and worship hall.
* {{ill|2001|en|2001|qid=Q1988|lt=2001|1=2001}} (Heisei 13) - Construction of the new shrine buildings was completed.

== annual Events ==
* [[Setsubun]] Yakuyoke (*Disaster Prevention*) festival

== Other Information ==
* The Matsuyama Branch Shrine is located directly south of the main Izumo Taisha.
* Ōkuninushi-no-Ōkami is associated with [[Daikokuten]], one of the [[Seven Lucky Gods]], and the shrine is part of the [[Iyo Seven Lucky Gods Pilgrimage]] as the location of Daikokuten.

== Access ==
* Accessible via the [[:en:Iyo Railway|Iyo Railway]] streetcar. Alight at the [[Honmachi Yonchōme Station]].

{{location map|Japan mapplot|coordinates={{Coord|33.846803|132.7585}}|caption=Izumo Taisha Matsuyama Branch Shrine|width=256}}

== Nearby locations ==
* [[:en:Route 196|Route 196]]
* [[Kayamachi Shopping Street]]
* [[Anumi Shrine]]

Listed as a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a {{ill|First Shrine of Tanba Province|ja|丹波国一宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Shrine of Tanba Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it is an independent Shinto shrine.
* {{ill|Iyo Shichifukujin Sacred Sites|ja|伊予七福神霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyo Shichifukujin Sacred Sites|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579347|1=Q135579347}}
* {{ill|Hitachi-no-Kuni Izumo-taisha|ja|常陸国出雲大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachi-no-Kuni Izumo-taisha|1=Hitachi-no-Kuni Izumo-taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q107410070}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuhara, Kasama City, Ibaraki Prefecture|ja|茨城県笠間市福原|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuhara, Kasama City, Ibaraki Prefecture|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
